actions.value:
To add a new asset to your Wallets list:

  1. Open Edge and log in
  2. Tap View Assets near the top or use the Assets tab at the bottom
  3. Use the Green + icon to add a new wallet to your account

To add a new asset to your Wallets list:

1. Open Edge and log in
2. Tap View Assets near the top or use the Assets tab at the bottom
3. Use the Green + icon to add a new wallet to your account
